title: Monte Carlo (first-visit / every-visit)
html:
Stub. The episodic-return state-value-estimation algorithm Yahir studied in spring-2025 RL coursework — first-visit vs every-visit return calculation across given MDP episodes, then averaged into V^π estimates. Captured in HW3 alongside SARSA / TD-learning.
